title: pleurospermum longicarpum
intro: Pleurospermum longicarpum, also known as the Long-fruited Pleurospermum, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). Native to the mountainous regions of China, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pleurospermum longicarpum include its ability to treat fever, respiratory infections, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil can be used topically for its therapeutic benefits.
